text:
☀ Boost Boss Standup — 2026-07-01 (Supply)

1) Run: fresh discovery pass → 10 new qualified candidates (0 overlap) → 6 filtered out → 3 gated drafts (nothing sent). Finding: a 'no-signup free homework solver' sub-vein (Edubrain, Mindko, aiHomeworkHelper) is the highest-pain, cleanest ICP yet — real traffic, typed-question intent, zero monetization by design.
2) Needs you: approve the 3 drafts; bless Edubrain / Mindko / aiHomeworkHelper as the next install targets.
3) Approvals: 3 new drafts waiting (+5 still open from 6-30: HomeworkO, YouLearn, StudyX, Studyable, QwenPaw).
4) Watch: sends gated on domain warm-up. Big-user study apps (TurboLearn ~5M, Mindgrasp ~5M) are hard-paywalled → filtered, not fits. Creative/roleplay vein (FictionLab, aiga_) carries brand-safety risk → review before matching demand.
5) Focus: lock the first ~5 study publishers to install; start the calibration-onboarding loop. Density > breadth.
